testimonials.name: Sarah Johnson
testimonials.title: Product Manager, TechCorp
testimonials.text: The suggestions actually save me time—not a gimmick. I pull up old decisions in seconds, and the UI never gets in my head. I wouldn't go back to my old stack.

testimonials.name: Michael Chen
testimonials.title: Founder, StartupXYZ
testimonials.text: We stopped losing context between chat and docs. One shared space, edits in real time, and we shipped our biggest release without the usual scramble.

testimonials.name: Emily Martinez
testimonials.title: Designer & Researcher
testimonials.text: I draft on my commute and polish at my desk. Sync has been rock-solid—it feels like one device, not three. Best money we spent on tooling this year.

features.title: Smart organization
features.description: Tags and suggestions that adapt to how you work, so the right note surfaces when you need it.

features.title: Real-time collaboration
features.description: Co-edit with your team and decide in the document instead of in another meeting.

features.title: Rich media support
features.description: Keep images, video, and files next to your ideas—one page, not a dozen attachments.

features.title: Sync everywhere
features.description: Edits save automatically and follow you across every device you use.

steps.title: Sign up in seconds
steps.description: Use your work email—no credit card to start. Your trial includes every premium feature from day one.

steps.title: Capture & organize
steps.description: Capture ideas fast, then shape them with notebooks and tags. Smart suggestions keep structure painless.

steps.title: Share & collaborate
steps.description: Invite teammates, set permissions, and collaborate live—everyone stays on the same version.
